tasks.title: Initialize Next.js project
tasks.description: Run 'npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --app --no-src-dir --import-alias @/*' in the repo root. Verify package.json, tsconfig.json, tailwind.config.ts, and app/page.tsx are created.
tasks.output: Created a runnable Next.js 16 + TypeScript + Tailwind scaffold inside web/ to keep the repo root for coordination files, installed dependencies, and verified the app builds successfully.

tasks.title: Design unified task data schema
tasks.description: Define JSON structure for tasks including title, owner, deadline, type, status, waiting_on_client, suggested_action, suggested_owner

tasks.title: Configure Anthropic API client
tasks.description: Install @anthropic-ai/sdk. Create lib/anthropic.ts that exports a configured Anthropic client instance. Create .env.local with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=placeholder.
tasks.output: Installed the Anthropic SDK in the nested web app, added a shared client helper, and created a local environment placeholder for ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

tasks.title: Build input panel for client communication
tasks.description: Create components/InputPanel.tsx — textarea to paste emails, transcripts, or meeting notes, with a submit button and loading state. The file InputPanel.tsx exists at repo root and must be moved/rebuilt at components/InputPanel.tsx to fit the Next.js project structure from TASK-000.
tasks.output: Rebuilt the input panel as a client component in the web app with textarea input, loading state, helper copy, and submit handling.

tasks.title: Write extraction prompt
tasks.description: Prompt to extract tasks, blockers, risks, deadlines, and detect waiting_on_client

tasks.title: Implement Extractor Agent API
tasks.description: Create POST /api/extract route at app/api/extract/route.ts. Accept { input: string }, call Anthropic using the extract prompt from prompts/extract.txt, return structured tasks JSON array matching the schema from types/schema.ts.

tasks.title: Render extracted tasks list
tasks.description: Create components/TaskList.tsx to render an array of tasks. Each card shows: title, type badge, status, deadline (if set), and a 'Waiting on client' indicator when waiting_on_client=true.

tasks.title: Write execution suggestion prompt
tasks.description: Prompt to generate actionable next steps and identify stakeholders

tasks.title: Implement Execution Assistant Agent API
tasks.description: Create POST /api/suggest route at app/api/suggest/route.ts. Accept { tasks: Task[] }, call Anthropic using the suggest prompt from prompts/suggest.txt, return the same tasks array with suggested_action and suggested_owner populated.

tasks.title: Display execution suggestions
tasks.description: Update components/TaskList.tsx to show suggested_action and suggested_owner fields on each task card when those fields are present.

tasks.title: Write email drafting prompt
tasks.description: Prompt to generate structured consultant-style update email

tasks.title: Implement Email Drafting Agent API
tasks.description: Create POST /api/draft route at app/api/draft/route.ts. Accept { tasks: Task[] }, call Anthropic using the draft prompt from prompts/draft.txt, return { email: string }.

tasks.title: Build email draft panel
tasks.description: Create components/SummaryPanel.tsx to display the generated email in a read-only textarea with a 'Copy to clipboard' button.
tasks.output: Built a client-side summary panel with a read-only email textarea and copy-to-clipboard action for drafted updates.

tasks.title: Integrate extraction flow
tasks.description: In app/page.tsx, wire InputPanel submit to POST /api/extract, store returned tasks in state, and render them via TaskList.

tasks.title: Integrate execution suggestion flow
tasks.description: Add a 'Get Suggestions' button in app/page.tsx. On click, POST tasks to /api/suggest, merge returned suggestions into task state, re-render TaskList with suggestion fields visible.

tasks.title: Integrate email drafting flow
tasks.description: Add a 'Draft Email' button in app/page.tsx. On click, POST enriched tasks to /api/draft and display the result in SummaryPanel.

tasks.title: Polish end-to-end demo experience
tasks.description: Ensure smooth flow from input → tasks → suggestions → email draft. Fix layout, loading states, error messages, and empty states so the demo runs without friction.
